title: Debugging, Review, and Adversarial Prompting · Evaluation Brief: Cause Repair
summary: Diagnose a failing build and review the repair against a base branch. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt cause repair increment in an evidence-first debug and review playbook. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Prompt for the smallest cause-level repair and a regression test.
Rank competing hypotheses and choose discriminating checks.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
